name: gatewaze-template-email
description: Email boilerplate. Each newsletter clones this repo on creation; the platform's react-email registry surfaces the blocks listed here in the edition editor's palette, and edition publishes write rendered HTML back to the cloned repo's `publish` branch.
comment: When render_kind='react-email', the platform's email-blocks registry (gatewaze-modules/newsletters/admin/components/puck/email-blocks) is the source of truth for component implementations. This manifest enables specific componentIds and may override per-block defaults / labels. Per-tenant TSX components committed to this repo are Phase 2 (runtime-compiled).

publish_layout.comment: Where the publish-worker writes per-edition outputs.
